set.sourceBehavior: `LoginScreen.kt` only shows static Google and Facebook sign-in icons; it does not implement image preview, zoom, gallery, or bitmap/exif handling.

set.sourceBehavior: `LoginScreen.kt` submits hard-coded credentials through `LoginViewModel`, shows an invalid-credentials snackbar when they do not match, and hands successful login off to the persisted session route transition.

verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `LoginScreen.kt` and `LoginViewModel.kt` use the credentials `abcxyz@gmail.com` / `abcdef`, navigate on success, and emit the message `Please enter correct email and password` on failure.
